返回本批次

我们采访了为伊朗制作热门乐高式人工智能视频的人

We spoke to the man making viral Lego-style AI videos for Iran

www.bbc.com 作者 breve 分数 73 评论 62 2026/04/12 10:37
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 9 小时前马特·谢伊（Matt Shea），主持人，热门评论和劳里·卡卢斯（Laurie Kalus），制片人，热门评论爆炸性媒体乍一看，它们看起来像是乐高电影中的场景，尽管更加生动和快节奏。但这些病毒式人工智能视频的灵感来自于立即可识别的乐高美学，以垂死的儿童、战斗机和美国总统唐纳德·特朗普为特色，实际上是亲伊朗的宣传。对于我们新的 BBC 播客，热门评论，我们采访了一位代表Explosive Media 的成员，是生成这些剪辑的主要帐户之一。他希望我们称他为爆炸先生。他是一位精明的社交媒体运营商，最初否认为伊朗政府工作。在之前的采访中，该媒体曾表示它是“完全独立的”。但在进一步询问后，爆炸先生承认该政权是“客户”——他之前从未公开证实过这一点。这些视频最重要的信息是，伊朗正在抵制它所认为的全能的全球压迫者：美国。这些视频很花哨，一点也不微妙，但这并没有影响人们分享和评论它们的热情。在其中一个视频中，唐纳德·特朗普陷入了“爱泼斯坦档案”文件的旋风中，说唱歌词告诉我们“秘密正在泄露，压力正在上升”。在另一个视频中，乔治·弗洛伊德当我们听到伊朗“为你们的系统所冤枉的所有人站在这里”时，我们可以看到在警察的靴子下。领先的宣传专家艾玛·布莱恩特博士表示，“Slopaganda”——去年在一篇学术论文中创造的对“AI slop”的玩笑——这个词太弱了，无法描述这种“高度复杂”内容的力量。据估计，在战争过程中，人工智能生成的宣传剪辑已被观看了数亿次。Explosive Media 的人工智能生成宣传视频并没有那么微妙。在我们与爆炸先生的视频通话中，他出现了轮廓，两侧是红色和绿色的灯光，这是伊朗国旗的颜色。他的办公桌上有一顶绿色羽毛头盔，与什叶派战士侯赛因·伊本·阿里 (Husayn ibn Ali) 相关，他在他们的多个视频中都有出现。他说，他在 Explosive Media 的团队只有不到 10 人，他们使用乐高风格的图形，“因为它是一种世界语言”。 X 上的伊朗和俄罗斯官方媒体账户定期向数百万粉丝分享这些内容。我们问 Explosive 先生，为什么爱泼斯坦的文件在他的视频中占据如此重要的位置。他说，这是为了向观众展示伊朗之间“他们正在目睹的那种对抗”，即“寻求真理和自由”，与“那些与食人者有联系的人”。这是指爱泼斯坦文件将特朗普政府与食人行为联系起来的理论，这一说法没有可靠的证据。观看：我们对爆炸先生的乐高风格视频中的事实错误提出质疑。视频中也充满了事实错误 - 因此我们向爆炸先生询问这些内容。在一个片段中，伊朗军方捕获了一名被击落的美国战斗机飞行员。美国官员证实，这名被击落的飞行员于 4 月 4 日被美国特种部队救起，这名飞行员在飞机被击落后被困在伊朗偏远山区。Explosive 先生不接受这一说法，他说：“可能没有失踪的飞行员，也没有救援行动。他们的主要目标是从伊朗窃取铀。”当我们反驳时——援引美国官员的话称，该飞行员目前正在科威特接受治疗——他声称：“只是特朗普先生所说的 13% 是基于事实。“Explosive Media 的飞行员视频成功地在英语受众中放大了这种另类叙述。美国的一位党派影响者 - @newswithsteph - 告诉她的观众，乐高视频“到目前为止准确得令人震惊；它们揭露了有关最近的美国飞行员任务的故事，该任务根本不是救援任务，而是铀的特别行动任务”。人工智能使伊朗和其他国家能够直接沟通布莱恩特说，比以往任何时候都更有效地吸引西方观众。他们使用的工具主要是根据西方数据进行训练的，这使得它们成为创建“适合文化”的内容的理想选择。这就是“过去想要针对西方的独裁国家所缺乏的”。诺丁汉特伦特大学的网络战专家 Tine Munk 博士将伊朗的战术描述为“防御性模因战”，创作者认为这是对抗美国言论所必需的。盖蒂图片社 自 2 月份战争开始以来，美国和以色列的军事行动已在伊朗造成了破坏媒体视频首次出现于 2025 年初，但在美伊战争之后，它们的受欢迎程度急剧上升。乐高风格的视频也变得越来越详细，显示了高度具体的海湾地点，包括发电站、机场和工业场所，被伊朗导弹完全摧毁。实际上，大多数只遭受了有限的损坏。这些视频通常是“实时”制作的，并在战争发生重大事态发展后很快出现。一个关于停火协议是在官方宣布之前就公布的。据伊朗、黎巴嫩和其他中东国家官员称，已有数千人丧生。当前的冲突始于二月份美国和以色列对伊朗发动袭击之后。经过一番交谈，爆炸先生承认伊朗政府确实是他公司的“客户”。在早些时候的 Instagram 消息中，他告诉我们，他的行动是直接受伊朗官员委托进行多个项目的。但 Explosive 先生为他的团队与政府的关系进行了辩护，称“为祖国工作是一种荣幸”。他将最近的大规模抗议活动视为特朗普总统资助的“政变”。爆炸先生还否认了我们向他提出的他的视频使用反犹太主义比喻的指控。 “我们的视频不是反犹太主义的；我们的视频是反犹太复国主义的，”他说。他为以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡饮血的描述进行辩护，称此类图像凸显了“他犯下的暴行”。由于全国范围内的互联网关闭，大多数伊朗人无法使用互联网。 Explosive先生声称他可以使用伊朗政府授予的“记者互联网”联系BBC。伊朗一直被评为世界上新闻自由最压制的国家之一。爆炸性媒体专家认为，人工智能生成的巧妙剪辑可能代表了一种强大的互联网外交形式，这种形式将继续存在。社交媒体平台已经关闭了乐高式视频的账户，但新的账户似乎也很快出现。蒙克认为，这是一种灵活、积极进取的互联网外交形式，似乎将继续存在。她补充说，最重要的是，它“消除了中间商、新闻界、大众媒体和不断传播的迷因。”这里不存在传统外交。它模糊了我们对正在发生的事情的理解。但这也增加了误解和升级的风险。“所以我们处于一种不确定的状态。”更多周末精选

Original Summary

  1. 9 hours agoMatt Shea,Presenter, Top CommentandLaurie Kalus,Producer, Top CommentExplosive MediaAt first glance they look like they could be scenes out of a Lego movie, although more vivid and fast-paced.But these viral AI videos inspired by the instantly recognisable Lego aesthetic feature dying children, fighter jets and US President Donald Trump - and are in fact pro-Iran propaganda.For our new BBC podcast, Top Comment, we spoke to a representative of Explosive Media, one of the key accounts generating these clips. He wanted us to refer to him as Mr Explosive.He's a savvy social media operator who initially denies working for the Iranian government. In previous interviews the outlet has said it is "totally independent". But upon further questioning, Mr Explosive admits the regime is a "customer" - something he's never before confirmed publicly. The overriding message of these videos is that Iran is resisting what it sees as an almighty global oppressor: the United States.The clips are garish and not subtle at all - but that hasn't put a dent in how vigorously people are sharing and commenting on them.In one of the videos, Donald Trump falls through a whirlwind of "Epstein file" documents as rap lyrics tell us "the secrets are leaking, the pressure is rising".In another, George Floyd can be seen under a policeman's boot as we hear Iran is "standing here for everyone your system ever wronged"."Slopaganda" - coined in an academic paper last year as a play on 'AI slop' - is too weak a term to capture how powerful this "highly sophisticated" content is, says leading propaganda expert Dr Emma Briant.AI-generated propaganda clips are estimated to have been viewed hundreds of millions of times over the course of the war.Explosive Media's AI-generated propaganda videos are not so subtleIn our video call with Mr Explosive, he appears silhouetted and flanked by red and green light, the colours of the Iranian flag. On his desk there's a green-feathered helmet associated with the Shia warrior Husayn ibn Ali, who features in several of their videos.He says his team at Explosive Media consists of fewer than ten people who use Lego-style graphics "because it is a world language". Iranian and Russian state media accounts on X regularly share them to millions of followers.We ask Mr Explosive why the Epstein files feature so heavily in his videos.He says it's to show the audience the "kind of confrontation they are witnessing" between Iran - which is "seeking truth and freedom" - against "those who associate themselves with cannibals".This is a reference to the theory that the Epstein files link the Trump administration to cannibalism - a claim for which there is no credible evidence.Watch: We challenge Mr Explosive on factual inaccuracies in one of his Lego-style clipsThe videos are also littered with factual inaccuracies - so we ask Mr Explosive about them.In one clip, the Iranian military is shown capturing a downed US fighter-jet pilot. US officials have confirmed the downed airman - who was stranded in a remote, mountainous region of Iran after his aircraft was shot down - was rescued by US special forces on 4 April.Mr Explosive does not accept this, saying: "Possibly there was no lost pilot, there was no rescue operation. Their main goal was to steal uranium from Iran."When we push back - citing US officials who say the airman is now receiving treatment in Kuwait - he claims: "Only 13% of what Mr Trump says is based on facts."Explosive Media's airman video has successfully amplified this alternative narrative among English-speaking audiences.One partisan US-based TikTok influencer - @newswithsteph - told her viewers the Lego videos had been "shockingly accurate so far; they broke the story about the recent US pilot mission that wasn't a rescue mission at all but a special ops mission for uranium".AI has enabled Iran and others to communicate directly with Western audiences more effectively than ever before, Briant says. They are using tools largely trained on Western data, making them ideal for creating "culturally appropriate" content.This is what "authoritarian countries wanting to target the West have lacked in the past".Dr Tine Munk, a cyber warfare expert at Nottingham Trent University, characterises Iran's tactics as "defensive memetic warfare" which the creators see as necessary to combat US rhetoric.Getty ImagesUS-Israeli military action has caused destruction in Iran since the beginning of the war in FebruaryExplosive Media videos first appeared in early 2025 - but their popularity has grown enormously in the wake of the US-Iran war.The Lego-style clips are also becoming increasingly detailed, showing highly specific Gulf locations including power stations, airports and industrial sites being totally destroyed by Iranian missiles.In reality, most have only sustained limited damage.The videos are often produced in "real time" and appear quickly after major developments in the war. One video about the ceasefire agreement was published before any official announcements.Thousands of people have been killed in Iran, Lebanon and other Middle Eastern countries, according to officials in these nations. The current conflict started in February after the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran.After some back-and-forth in our conversation, Mr Explosive admits the Iranian government is indeed a "customer" of his company. In earlier Instagram messages, he'd told us his operation had been directly commissioned for multiple projects by Iranian officials.But Mr Explosive defends his team's relationship with the government saying it was "honourable to work for the homeland". He dismisses the recent mass protests as a "coup" funded by President Trump.Mr Explosive also rejects allegations we put to him his videos use antisemitic tropes. "Our videos are not antisemitic; our videos are anti-Zionist," he says. Defending the depiction of Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu drinking blood, he says such imagery highlights the "atrocities committed by him".Most Iranians are unable to use the internet due to a nationwide internet shutdown. Mr Explosive claims he could contact the BBC using "journalist internet" granted by the Iranian government. Iran is consistently ranked as one of the most repressive countries in the world for press freedom.Explosive MediaExperts believe the slick AI-generated clips could represent a powerful form of internet diplomacy that's here to staySocial media platforms have been shutting down accounts with the Lego-style videos, but new ones seem to pop up just as quickly. It's a form of agile, aggressive internet diplomacy that appears to be here to stay, according to Munk.Crucially, she adds, it's "cutting out the middlemen, cutting out the press, the mass media, and constantly circulating memes."Traditional diplomacy doesn't exist here. And it blurs our understanding of what is happening. But it also increases the risk of misinterpretation and escalation."So we are in a kind of limbo."More weekend picks

dtagames 2026/04/12 10:53
他们没有收录最新、最好的一段精彩的说唱视频，该视频导致制作人被禁止在 YouTube 上播放。

一家新闻网站发布了此存档副本：

https://youtu.be/5G9DNx7xIIc?si=XxIep3pySW7ZS8zb

They didn't include the latest and best one, a terrific rap video that got the producer banned from YouTube.

A press website posted this archive copy:

https://youtu.be/5G9DNx7xIIc?si=XxIep3pySW7ZS8zb

Barbing 2026/04/12 12:13
永远不会发现这一点。查了一下，很有趣：

“为了响应您完全有效的请求，并配合抵制美元的行动，我们关闭了 USDT 钱包。 请改用比特币或 Solana。”

https://xcancel.com/ExplosiveMediaa/status/20419442863300406...

"In response to your completely valid request, and in line with the boycott of the US dollar, we have closed our USDT wallet. Please use Bitcoin or Solana instead."

https://xcancel.com/ExplosiveMediaa/status/20419442863300406...

在 HN 中查看
davidw 2026/04/12 11:36
我不知道 YT 的禁止标准是什么，但大约 5 秒后，他们就释放了一些漂亮的反犹太主义比喻。
IDK what YT's standards are for banning things, but like 5 seconds in, they let loose with some pretty anti-semitic tropes.
在 HN 中查看
deaux 2026/04/12 11:40
所有引用它的歌词都在谈论国家、政府和总统。如果他们被描绘成与美国总统进行金融交易是一种“反犹太主义比喻”，那么就不可能讽刺这些现实世界的事件。我错过了其他真正的比喻吗？
All of the lyrics that reference it are talking about the country, the government and its president. If them being pictured as making a financial trade with the US president is an "anti-semitic trope", it becomes impossible to satirize these real-world events. Is there a different real trope that I missed?
在 HN 中查看
crooked-v 2026/04/12 12:10
“犹太人暗中做事，损害普通民众的利益”长期以来一直是右翼阴谋论，甚至早在现代政治发明之前就已存在。

话虽如此，我认为这段视频被视为宣传片，尽可能地说明了问题——它严格坚持将以色列称为一个国家，但同样重要的是，将特朗普视为主要演员，而不是接受以色列的指导。

"The Jews are secretly running things to the detriment of the common person" has been a right-wing conspiracy theory for a long time, going well before even the invention of modern politics.

With that said, I think the video, looked at as a propaganda piece, threads the needle about as well as possible - it sticks strictly to referring to Israel as a country, but also just as importantly frames Trump as the primary actor rather than taking direction from Israel.

jmann99999 2026/04/12 11:30
有谁知道“爆炸先生”团队用什么人工智能工具来制作这些吗？我发现乐高动画的质量非常好。我过去制作过定格动画乐高视频，这令人印象深刻。

感谢您的任何见解。

Has anyone figured out what AI tool the "Mr. Explosive" team is using to make these? I find the quality of the LEGO animation to be really good. I have made stop-motion LEGO videos in the past, and this is impressive.

Thanks for any insight.

anal_reactor 2026/04/12 14:53

在 HN 中查看
deaux 2026/04/12 11:49
很多评论都在谈论伊朗政权。我看到的视频并没有对伊朗政权做出任何积极的评价，他们所做的只是正确地批评美国政权对伊朗进行的袭击，这正如预期的那样，给伊朗人民带来了更多的痛苦，而没有改善他们的生活。伊朗政权杀害了数千名抗议者 没有什么 关于对伊朗的袭击的合法性和影响，并相信其他观点是由于美国的宣传而引起的。

如果你真正关心伊朗人民，你就会同意这些视频，因为袭击只会让他们的生活变得更糟。这完全是意料之中的事，看看美国前两次袭击中东国家是怎么回事。

A lot of comments talking about the Iranian regime. The videos I've seen say nothing positive about the Iranian regime, all they do is rightfully criticize the US regime that carried out an assault out on Iran, which as expected has led to nothing but more suffering for the Iranians, without improving their lives. That the Iranian regime killed thousands of protestors says nothing about both the legitimacy and the effects of the attack on Iran, and believing otherwise is caused by being raised on US propaganda.

If you truly care about the Iranian people, you'd be agreeing with these videos, because the attack has only made their lives worse. And this was completely expected, look at how the last two times of the US attacking a country in the Middle East went.

在 HN 中查看
oa335 2026/04/12 11:58
我在伊朗的一位朋友以前批评政府，现在非常支持他们。 我想知道在这场战争中还有多少伊朗人成为政府的支持者。
One of my friends in Iran who was previously critical of the government is now highly supportive of them. I wonder how many other Iranians have become supporters of the government during this war.
在 HN 中查看
culi 2026/04/12 12:24
我从许多我认识的伊朗人那里听到了同样的说法。西方媒体将抗议活动描述为试图推翻秩序，但许多抗议者似乎只是呼吁改革。
I've heard the same from many Iranians I know. Western media presented the protests as an attempt to overthrow the order but it seems many protestors were simply calling for reform.
在 HN 中查看
Ray20 2026/04/12 12:31
> 似乎许多抗议者只是呼吁改革

我的意思是，当你因企图推翻秩序而被判处死刑时，你当然会“只是呼吁改革”。

> seems many protestors were simply calling for reform

I mean, when you would have literally death penalty for attempt to overthrow the order, of course you will be "simply calling for reform".

drnick1 2026/04/12 11:55
虽然平民伤亡在任何冲突中都不可避免，但这里的想法是，如果政权垮台，中东的面貌将彻底改变。只要看看 1979 年之前的伊朗，想象一下如果神权政治没有在半个世纪里无情地压迫人民的话，今天会是什么样子。也许这位创作者应该使用 AI 生成 IRGC 杀害估计 30,000 名自己人的视频[0]。

[0] https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Iran_massacres

While civilian casualties are unavoidable in any conflict, the idea here is that if the regime falls, the face of the Middle East will completely change. Just look at Iran pre-1979 and imagine what it would be today had the theocracy not mercilessly oppressed the population for half a century. Perhaps this creator should use AI to generate a video of the IRGC killing an estimated 30,000 of their own people[0].

[0] https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Iran_massacres

在 HN 中查看
mentalfist 2026/04/12 12:02
“平民伤亡不可避免”与“一个文明将因战争罪行而被毁灭并送回石器时代”之间存在一定的跨越
There is a certain leap between "civilian casualties are unavoidable" and "a civilization Is going to be destroyed and sent back to the stone age through war crimes"
在 HN 中查看
drnick1 2026/04/12 12:07
特朗普的言论显然是在炫耀武力。至少到目前为止，美国还没有在短时间内处决超过 30,000 名伊朗人，并且在过去 50 年里处决了无数伊朗人。
Trump's comments are quite obviously saber-rattling. Until now at least, the U.S. hasn't executed 30,000+ Iranians in a short period of time, and countless more over the past five decades.
在 HN 中查看
bulbar 2026/04/12 12:24
政权更迭并不是真正的目标，不是吗？没有密切关注，但对我来说，目标似乎只是摧毁伊朗作为一个地区大国，对其人民造成可怕的后果。
Regime change isn't the real goal here, is it? Haven't followed closely, but to me it seems the goal is to just destroy Iran as a regional power, with dire consequences for its population.

ozozozd 2026/04/12 12:01

人们无需怀疑。你的第一个猜测是正确的！

One might wonder what helped the theocracy take over the pre-1979 Iran.

One need not wonder. Your first guess is correct!

superb_dev 2026/04/12 12:10
在冲突中，一些平民伤亡肯定是不可避免的，但美国和以色列并没有非常努力
Some civilian casualties may be unavoidable in a conflict sure, but the US and Israel are not trying very hard
在 HN 中查看
Larrikin 2026/04/12 12:06
如果最终负责的人更糟糕，那么这是毫无意义的抱怨。想象会发生什么是没有意义的。世界正在处理现在存在的问题。
This is a pointless complaint if the person who has ended up in charge is worse. There's no point in imagining what could have been. The world is dealing with what exist now.
在 HN 中查看
blizdiddy 2026/04/12 12:02
这一切与美国唯一有关的是美国支持神权政治！如果没有国会和我们的盟友，我们不能单方面违反所有国际法和主权……这很明显，所以你在说什么？
The only thing any of that has to do with the US is that the US backed that theocracy! We cannot unilaterally violate all international law and sovereignty without Congress and our allies… that’s obvious though so what are you talking about?
在 HN 中查看
crooked-v 2026/04/12 12:16
只是这里的效果不是推翻政权，而是让强硬派掌握绝对权力，同时在外交谈判中谋杀他的全家。然后谋杀大量无辜者，比如那所充满真正孩子的学校，以确保整个国家团结在他周围。
Except that the effect here has not been to overturn the regime, but rather to put a hardliner into absolute power while also murdering his entire family in the middle of diplomatic negotations. And then murdering plenty of innocent people, like that school full of literal children, to ensure that the country rallies around him.

georgeburdell 2026/04/12 11:40
让我感到很奇怪的是，甚至在战前，西方主流媒体就忽视了 1 月份 3 万名抗议者被屠杀的情况。 一段时间以来，他们一直对伊朗政权小心翼翼，就像本文所例证的那样。
It’s really bizarre to me that, even before the war, the mainstream western media ignored the 30k protesters getting massacred in January. They have been using kid gloves with the Iranian regime for some time, like this article exemplifies.
在 HN 中查看
6yyyyyy 2026/04/12 12:07

The protests and killings were extremely widely reported at the time.
在 HN 中查看
fragmede 2026/04/12 12:15
由于伊朗人民无法接入互联网，媒体的影响力受到限制。这件事没有被广泛报道。
Without access to the Internet from the Iranian people, the media reach was limited. It was not widely reported.
在 HN 中查看
dingaling 2026/04/12 13:42
我不知道你为什么会这么认为，甚至连美国总统都在推特上谈论此事
I'm not sure why you think that when even the US President was tweeting about it
在 HN 中查看
SV_BubbleTime 2026/04/12 11:41
您认为中国对屏幕上显示的内容有多少控制权？我怀疑不是没有。
How much control does China have on what comes across your screen do you think? I suspect it is not none.
在 HN 中查看
Barbing 2026/04/12 12:05
（不是父母）

有件事一直困扰着我，那就是我们的领导层对屏幕上显示的内容几乎没有控制力。

1 - 我们已经阅读了有关巨魔农场的信誉良好的报告。

2 - 我们还没有看到问题已解决的报告。

3 - 我们知道我们的政客在社交媒体上。

据推测，美国政界人士每天都会至少看到一篇冒充其选民的帖子。他们如何避免有意识（如果不是潜意识）的影响？

(not parent)

Something's been bothering me, and it's how little control our leadership has over what comes across their screens.

1 - We've read the reputable reporting on the troll farms.

2 - We haven't seen reporting that the problem is fixed.

3 - We know our politicians are on social media.

Presumably, every single day, American politicians see at least one post from someone pretending to be their constituent. How are they avoiding conscious, if not subconscious, influence?

在 HN 中查看
ipaddr 2026/04/12 12:17
准确数字是6000人，但以色列方面有人表示可能达到30000人。

抗议者是由以色列国防军和中央情报局组织的持枪武装士兵。

The accurate number is 6,000 but someone from Israel's side said it could be up to 30,000.

Protesters are armed solders with guns organized by IDF and CIA.

在 HN 中查看
culi 2026/04/12 12:33
具体来说，伊朗的人权活动人士人数为 6,488 人。伊朗国际是索赔更多的主要渠道（最初是 1 万，然后是 3 万，现在是 4 万）。伊朗国际实际上是沙特所有，技术上总部位于英国，但正如《卫报》的调查显示，它并不是一个真正的新闻机构。这只是穆罕默德·本·萨勒曼的一个宣传渠道

https://www.theguardian.com/world/2018/oct/31/concern-over-u...

Specifically, Human Rights Activists in Iran's count is 6,488. Iran International is the main outlet that claimed more (first 10k, then 30k and now 40k). Iran International is actually Saudi-owned and technically based in the UK but, as The Guardian's investigation showed, is not a real journalistic institution. It's just a propaganda outlet for Mohammed bin Salman

https://www.theguardian.com/world/2018/oct/31/concern-over-u...

在 HN 中查看
drnick1 2026/04/12 11:32
从最近发生的事件来看，很明显毛拉们对为了人民的利益而进行谈判不感兴趣。任何人都清楚，如果伊朗将其在秘密核设施和导弹上投入的所有资源都投入到经济发展、基础设施和教育中，那么今天的伊朗将会处于完全不同的境地。可悲的是，该政权的首要目标是自我保护，它唯一理解的语言就是暴力。
It's quite clear in view of recent events that the mullahs aren't interested in negotiating for the good of their people. It is obvious to anyone that if Iran put all the resources they poured into secret nuclear facilities and missiles into economic development, infrastructure, and education, Iran would be in a completely different place today. Sadly, the regime's primary objective is self-preservation, and the only language it understands is violence.
在 HN 中查看
oa335 2026/04/12 11:44
伊朗将其 GDP 的约 2% 用于国防，与世界上大多数国家相比并不算多。

https://data.worldbank.org/indicator/MS.MIL.XPND.GD.ZS?locat...

问题不在于支出的多少，而在于支出的多少。他们可以不花任何钱，但仍然会遭到轰炸，因为他们与美国及其盟友/附庸国敌对。

Iran spends about 2% of its GDP on defense, not that much compared to most countries in the world.

https://data.worldbank.org/indicator/MS.MIL.XPND.GD.ZS?locat...

The issue isn’t the amount of spending; they could spend nothing and would still get bombed because they are antagonistic to the US and its allies/vassals.

在 HN 中查看
abernard1 2026/04/12 12:03
“对抗”

他们是一个神权政权，没有得到80%人口的支持。同性恋会被判处死刑。他们利用来自中国的监控来确保女性始终佩戴头巾。他们禁止访问互联网。五十年来，“美国去死”的口号是他们政府的例行问候语。 他们故意在学校和医院放置军事装备，将美国的同情心视为弱点。他们招募儿童兵并让他们公开驻扎在军事目标。

肯定存在“对抗”，但表现得好像伊朗人民如果可以的话就不会轰炸自己的政府……这有点过分了。

"antagonistic"

They are a theocratic regime which is not supported by 80% of its population. Being gay is punishable by death. They employ surveillance from China to ensure hijabs are worn by women at all times. They ban access to the internet. Chants of "Death to America" are their government's routine greeting for 50 years. They place military equipment in schools and hospitals deliberately, viewing US compassion as a weakness. They recruit child soldiers and have them publicly stationed at military targets.

There is definitely "antagonism," but to act as if the Iranian people would not bomb their own government if they could... it's a bit much.

在 HN 中查看
nivertech 2026/04/12 11:53

statistics == lies
在 HN 中查看
dottjt 2026/04/12 11:33

This comment is completely ignorant of at least the past 80+ years of Middle East history.

kQq9oHeAz6wLLS 2026/04/12 12:16

This comment is completely devoid of refuting evidence.
在 HN 中查看
colechristensen 2026/04/12 11:39
呃，很明显，没有核武器的国家是由大国随心所欲地存在的，尤其是现在。 “守规矩，我们会让你有一些繁荣，除非你需要防御，在这种情况下祝你好运”并不是一个有力的论据。

伊朗当权者并不积极支持人民的利益，其中很大一部分人不想与他们的宗教原教旨主义有任何关系。

当压迫性的狂热分子的整个存在都建立在敌人的基础上时，你如何说服他们为和平而努力？ “美国去死吧！”成为政治集会上流行的口号。

Eh, it's also clear that nations without nuclear arms exist at the whims of great powers, particularly now. "behave and we'll let you have some prosperity unless you need defense in which case good luck" isn't exactly a strong argument.

And the people in power in Iran actively are not in favor of the good of their people, a large proportion of which want nothing to do with their religious fundamentalism.

How do you convince oppressive zealots to play nice for peace when their whole existence rests on having enemies? "death to America!" being the popular chant at political rallies.

stavros 2026/04/12 11:33
> 任何人都显而易见的是，如果伊朗将其在秘密核设施和导弹上投入的所有资源都投入到经济发展、基础设施和教育中，那么今天的伊朗将会处于一个完全不同的境地

> It is obvious to anyone that if Iran put all the resources they poured into secret nuclear facilities and missiles into economic development, infrastructure, and education, Iran would be in a completely different place today

在 HN 中查看
drnick1 2026/04/12 11:47
> 有趣的是，我只是在想美国。

我不知道有诚意的人如何能够将伊朗的经济与美国进行比较

> Funny, I was just thinking that about the US.

在 HN 中查看
stavros 2026/04/12 11:48
他们不能。然而，如果美国在教育上花更多的钱，而在导弹上花更少的钱，那么美国的情况确实会有所不同。
They can't. And yet, it's true that the US would be a different place if it spent more money on education and less on missiles.
在 HN 中查看
Ray20 2026/04/12 12:21
> 如果它在教育上花更多的钱，在导弹上花更少的钱

等等，美国难道不是世界上教育支出最高的国家吗？而正是世界上最高的导弹支出才使得这一切成为可能。因此，导弹方面的资金减少就意味着教育方面的资金减少。

> if it spent more money on education and less on missiles

Wait, isn't the US has literally the highest spending on education in the world? And it is precisely the highest spending in the world on missiles that make it possible. So less money on missiles would mean less money on education.

在 HN 中查看
themafia 2026/04/12 11:41
> 伊朗将所有资源投入秘密核设施和导弹

伊朗已多次同意开放它们进行检查。

> 经济发展、基础设施和教育

他们被禁运到了不能这样做的地步。

> 今天的伊朗将处于完全不同的境地。

伊朗货币得到了国王留下的皇冠上的宝石的支持。

> Iran put all the resources they poured into secret nuclear facilities and missiles

Iran has agreed to open them for inspection several times.

> into economic development, infrastructure, and education

They're embargoed to a point where they can't do this.

> Iran would be in a completely different place today.

Iran's currency is backed by the crown jewels the Shah left behind.

vvpan 2026/04/12 11:37

I know, I know, this is not the platform. But however I dislike the war (which sounds across-the-board unpopular except with Republican senators) having love for a regime that massacres protestors by the thousands is cruel and perverse.

bigbinary 2026/04/12 11:51

在 HN 中查看
culi 2026/04/12 12:43
US prisoners per capita: 715

伊朗人均囚犯人数：226

我特别感兴趣的是，伊朗的囚犯有投票权，而美国的囚犯的投票权却可能被剥夺。

US prisoners per capita: 715

Iran prisoners per capita: 226

Particularly interesting to me is how prisoners in Iran have the right to vote while prisoners in the US can have their vote taken away.

在 HN 中查看
dingaling 2026/04/12 13:49
2024 年和 2025 年年度人均处决人数（不包括伊朗抗议活动）：

美国：千分之一； 860 万分之一

伊朗：97,000 人中有 1 人； 62,000 分之一

Annual executions per capita, 2024 and 2025, excluding the Iranian protests:

USA: 1 in 12 million; 1 in 8.6 million

Iran: 1 in 97,000; 1 in 62,000

在 HN 中查看
b00ty4breakfast 2026/04/12 12:07
批评美国针对伊朗的行动绝不是纵容该政权对其本国公民所做的事情。 特别是因为这些行动直接加剧了伊朗人民的苦难。

我并不是说你个人对此故意迟钝和不细致（我什至不是说没有人同情伊朗政权），但绝对有人对此故意迟钝和不细致。

Criticizing the US's actions against Iran is in no way condoning the things that the regime has done to it's own citizens. Especially since those actions are contributing directly to the Iranian people's hardship.

I'm not saying that you, personally, are being deliberately obtuse and unnuanced about this (and I'm not even saying that there aren't people who are sympathizing with the Iranian regime) but there are absolutely people being deliberately obtuse and unnuanced about it.

在 HN 中查看
zoklet-enjoyer 2026/04/12 11:54

I don't think most people have love for the Iranian government. We hate war and bullies
在 HN 中查看
kakacik 2026/04/12 11:55
我“喜欢”这种豪华的框架。您是否喜欢一场战争来改变现状？成千上万的平民死于一名精神病老人的突发奇想，无论如何没有人有胆量阻止他。他可以声称他正在对整个国家进行种族灭绝，然后……什么都没有？我知道，这是美国发动的一场不那么血腥、毫无意义的战争，最终再次失败，但仍然如此。每个人的美国税收都在帮助为此提供资金。

没有取得任何实质性成果，至少对美国来说不是积极的。以色列正在玩弄你，就像玩弄驴子和胡萝卜一样。这不是侮辱你的自尊和自我价值吗？你失去了全球所有合作伙伴，每个人都讨厌与美国打交道，并对寡头们每天的奇思妙想翻白眼。

中国非常高兴，俄罗斯也非常高兴，所以这是肯定的。而伊朗，他们将继续做他们的事情，无论你做什么，中央情报局必须接受他们对此无能为力。伊朗如果不全力以赴为自己制造核弹，那就太愚蠢了。俄罗斯人如果在这一点上不帮助他们，那就太愚蠢了。

I 'love' this sort of posh framing. Is there a war you like for a change? Thousands of civilians are dying on whims of an old mentally sick man, with nobody having balls to stop him anyhow. He can claim he is setting up a genocide of entire nation to whole world and... nothing? I know, one of the less bloody senseless wars US waged, ending up defeated again, but still. Everybody's US taxes are helping financing this.

Nothing substantial achieved, at least not positive for US. Israel is toying with you like with a donkey and carrot on stick. Is that not insulting to your own pride and self-worth? You lost all partners globally, everybody hates dealing with US and rolls their eyes on another daily set of whims of your oligarchs.

China is damn happy, russia is very happy so there is certainly that. And Iran, they will keep doing their thing, regardless of what you do and cia has to accept there isnt much they can change about that. Iran would be stupid to not throw everything into getting nuclear bomb for themselves. russians would be stupid to not help them there at this point.

Johnny_Bonk 2026/04/12 12:04
日复一日，现实似乎越来越不真实……当我还是个孩子的时候，我不认为战争会包括乐高风格的心理战视频……
Day after day, reality seems less and less real… when I was a kid I didn’t think war would include LEGO style psyops videos…
在 HN 中查看
culi 2026/04/12 12:40
你应该看看美国是如何推翻危地马拉第一位民选领导人的。一位自称资本家的人甚至被《纽约时报》贴上“共产主义者”的标签，因为他们希望香蕉公司缴纳一些最低限度的税。

此后，《纽约时报》承认他们在报道中与中央情报局有密切的合作关系，但最重要的是，它从未为此道歉。

看到现代人对“假新闻”的恐慌似乎是一种新现象，真是令人难过。相反，这对我来说就像是“回旋镖理论”的实际应用

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Imperial_boomerang

You should look at how the US overthrew Guatemala's first elected leader. A self-proclaimed capitalist was labelled a "communist" by even the NYTimes because they wanted the banana companies to pay some minimal taxes.

NYTimes has since admitted to their close partnership with the CIA in its coverage but, crucially, it has never apologized for it.

It's sad to see the modern panic over "fake news" as if it's a new phenomenon. Rather, this feels to me like the "boomerang theory" in action

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Imperial_boomerang

在 HN 中查看
b00ty4breakfast 2026/04/12 12:13
谴责美国！=纵容伊朗政权。 伙计们，这不是火箭装置；这不是火箭装置。说在猫窃贼与孩子一起吃饭时谋杀他们是错误的，并不代表对入室盗窃的认可（特别是当谋杀是为了收取人寿保险而不是阻止入室盗窃时）
condemning the US != condoning the Iranian regime. This is not rocket appliance, you guys; saying it's wrong to murder cat burglars while they eat dinner with their kids is not an endorsement of burglary (especially when the murder is about collecting life insurance rather than stopping burglary)

[deleted] 2026/04/12 11:34 deleted

[已删除]

[deleted]

在 HN 中查看
shubhamjain 2026/04/12 11:54
这篇文章听起来作者显然很不高兴为什么这些视频被分享，这对他们来说仅仅是“宣传”。 “马虎”、“事实不准确”、“伊朗是对新闻自由最压制的国家。”

“我们交谈过”在这里做了超出必要的工作。也许只是问一些事情并写下我们决定写的内容。我的问题不在于这些说法，它们是真实的，而是设定一个叙述，一个国家正在利用社交媒体进行宣传，而显然忽视了这里更糟糕的行为者的罪行。

The article sounds like the author is visibly upset why these videos are being shared, which are mere “propaganda” to them. “Slop”, “factually inaccurate”, “Iran, the most repressive country for press freedom.”

“We spoke” is doing a more than necessary work here. Maybe just ask a few things and wrote what we had decided to write. My problem isn’t with those claims, which are true, but setting a narrative where a single country is exploiting social media for propaganda while clearly ignoring the crimes of much worse actors here.
